signals.raw:
Trump announces U.S.-Iran two-week ceasefire agreement ahead of 8 p.m. ET deadline on April 7, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**

President Donald Trump confirmed on Tuesday evening (April 7, 2026) that the U.S. reached a two-week ceasefire with Iran, averting escalation just before an 8 p.m. ET deadline amid threats of strikes on Iranian infrastructure and demands to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.[1]

signals.headline: Republicans Vote to Block Elon Musk Testimony on DOGE Social Security Plans** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][4]

Republicans Vote to Block Elon Musk Testimony on DOGE Social Security Plans** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][4]

House Ways and Means Social Security Subcommittee Ranking Member John Larson (D-CT) demanded answers from President Trump and Elon Musk regarding Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) activities at the Social Security Administration, including office closures and layoffs. Every Republic
